CONTENT.Honours: IndividualUNFP Ligue 2 Team of the Year: 2023–24
CONTENT.Club career: Abdelli made his professional debut for Le Havre in a 2–0 Coupe de la Ligue win over Troyes on 31 October 2018.In June 2022, Abdelli signed a four-year contract with Angers.
CONTENT.External links: Himad Abdelli – French league stats at LFP – also available in French (archived)Himad Abdelli at SoccerwayHAC Profile
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played on 19 December 2023
CONTENT.International career: Abdelli made his debut for the Algeria national team on 18 June 2023 in a 2–1 win over Uganda in qualification matches for the 2023 Africa Cup of Nations.
CONTENT.Early and personal life: Abdelli was born in Montivilliers in Normandy, to an Algerian father and a Guadeloupean mother. He holds both French and Algerian nationalities.

SUMMARY: Himad Abdelli (born 17 November 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for  Ligue 1 club Angers. Born in France, he plays for the Algeria national team.
